title: gDNA extraction from Sterivex filters
author: Sophie Jurgensen
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ijccciw

steps.title: Plug the outflow port of Sterivex cartridge using cha-seal clay
steps.instruction: Plug the outflow port of Sterivex cartridge using cha-seal clay. Ensure that incubator is set to 65°C. Place rotator in the incubator. Cha-seal tube sealing compound Medline Catalog #CSX43510 Sterivex™ filter unit without filling bell Merck Millipore (EMD Millipore) Catalog #SVGP01050 Labquake™ Rotisserie Hybridization Rotator Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #M90615Q

steps.title: Add CTAB extraction solution to each...
steps.instruction: Add CTAB extraction solution to each cartridge using a needle and syringe. undetermined, CTAB extraction solution Dispense liquid slowly and be careful to avoid air bubbles that will clog the port. CTAB extraction solution Teknova Catalog #C2190 3ml syringe Becton Dickinson (BD) Catalog #BD 309586 22 gauge needle Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #Z192473

steps.title: Add 65μL of Proteinase K (10mg/mL)...
steps.instruction: Add 65μL of Proteinase K (10mg/mL) and 65μL of Lysozyme (10mg/mL) to each cartridge using a needle and syringe. These may be combined and added to each tube in a single aliquot. Proteinase K Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #EO0491 Lysozyme Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #12671-19-1

steps.title: Add 162μL of filter-sterilized SDS (10%) to each tube
steps.instruction: Add 162μL of filter-sterilized SDS (10%) to each tube. Invert to mix. SDS, 10% Solution Life Technologies Catalog #AM9822

steps.title: Cap open end of each cartridge...
steps.instruction: Cap open end of each cartridge with a luer lock cap and incubate in rotary agitator at 65°C for 2 hours. 02:00:00, incubation

steps.title: Label 2 sets of 2mL centrifuge tubes with sample name
steps.instruction: Label 2 sets of 2mL centrifuge tubes with sample name. One set will be kept and frozen (-20°C) while the other set will be used for further extraction.

steps.title: Using 3mL luer-lock syringe, attach to...
steps.instruction: Using 3mL luer-lock syringe, attach to Sterivex cartridge and draw out fluid. Depress 2mL of sample material into the first storage 2mL centrifuge tube, then pipette out 800μL of this solution into other labeled 2mL tube for further extraction. Place the 1st 2mL tube into the freezer. Start the cool-down sequence in the microcentrifuge (set to 4°C).

steps.title: Add 800μL of phenol:chloroform:isoamyl alcohol (PCI, 25:24:1, pH 8
steps.instruction: Add 800μL of phenol:chloroform:isoamyl alcohol (PCI, 25:24:1, pH 8.0) to each tube and vortex to mix. undetermined, P:C:I Do this step in a fume hood. UltraPure™ Phenol:Chloroform:Isoamyl Alcohol (25:24:1, v/v) Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #15593031

steps.title: Add 800μL of chloroform:isoamyl alcohol (CI, 24:1) to each tube
steps.instruction: Add 800μL of chloroform:isoamyl alcohol (CI, 24:1) to each tube. Invert and vortex to mix thoroughly, then centrifuge at 15,000rpm for 5 minutes. Transfer upper aqueous phase to a new 2mL centrifuge tube. undetermined, C:I Repeat this step again. The second time, transfer the upper aqueous phase to a 1.5mL centrifuge tube. Chloroform:Isoamyl alcohol 24:1 Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #C0549

steps.title: Centrifuge at 4°C, 10,000rpm for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 4°C, 10,000rpm for 5 minutes. Transfer upper aqueous phase to a new 2mL centrifuge tube. a Be careful to not aspirate the interface between the aqueous phases. Do not attempt to remove all of the upper aqueous phase.

steps.title: Add 450μL of room temperature isopropanol...
steps.instruction: Add 450μL of room temperature isopropanol (100%) to each tube, inverting gently to mix. Incubate at room temperature for 2 hours to overnight. undetermined, Isopropanol 02:00:00, Incubation Isopropanol Contributed by users

steps.title: Centrifuge the tubes at 10,000rpm for 20 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the tubes at 10,000rpm for 20 minutes. Carefully decant by pouring liquid out of the tube and into a small clean petri dish, then blot tubes dry using a paper towel on the benchtop. You can also aspirate the liquid using a pipette. The petri dish serves to catch the DNA pellet if it is accidentally poured out during this step.

steps.title: Add 1
steps.instruction: Add 1.4mL of 70% ethanol to each tube and gently invert several times to mix. Centrifuge at 10,000rpm for 5 minutes. Pour off ethanol. undetermined, ethanol Ethanol Contributed by users

steps.title: Dry tubes in laminar hood for...
steps.instruction: Dry tubes in laminar hood for 10-15 minutes or until completely dry. Note that pellets may become dislodged from sides of tube, so take care not to invert tubes.

steps.title: Add 50μL of sterile Nuclease free...
steps.instruction: Add 50μL of sterile Nuclease free ultra-pure water to each tube and gently pipet to dissolve DNA. undetermined, nuclease free water It may be helpful to either pre-heat the water to 50°C or to incubate the tubes at 37°C for 1-2 hrs to facilitate dissolution. Ultrapure Distilled, Nuclease Free Water Contributed by users

steps.title: Measure the DNA concentration using NanoDrop...
steps.instruction: Measure the DNA concentration using NanoDrop and freeze samples at -80°C. Record 260/280 ratio as well as DNA concentration. a A 260/280 ratio of 1.8-2 is considered "pure" DNA. NanoDrop spectrophotometer Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #ND-1000
